entries.text: The initial GM response is hanging.  it does show up if I click an inventory item, or go to another screen then back.

context.scene: Trade track south of the limestone bend — open scrub, pale winter grass, Echo River audible to the left, Millbrook's smoke a few hours south. Morning light full from the east. Silas standing at the li
context.lastGmTurn: Silas leaves a note in the cache hollow — Mara Wells, Millbrook, Answers — and consults Pell and Calvar on what to do with the rest.
context.lastAction: Swap map for note; consult companions on remaining items
